The test review found two regression gaps, both applied in 1a1bda23cf19fa7d3551fa93b858d30cd98c157e. Validation: 55 focused tests, 815 full tests, git diff checks, and the generated themed-room check passed. Fresh seed 710009 Wizard gnome Massacre parity matched all 3192 PRNG calls, full first-prompt screen, and cursor at production commit 604af719; final 1a1bda2 changes tests only. Validation: 1048 tests; strict fresh seed 870091 and 872875 differentials matched 5289 PRNG calls, four complete screens and cursors; development matched 302 screens, 78645 RNG calls, and 590 cursors; diff checks passed. Startup and replay changes were inspected but those frontiers are not advanced because earlier audit-fix tails precede this exact range. No holdout access.

Seven test fixes cover the runner budget, both seer call sites, throwing hunger RNG order, all diet flags, right-ring cases, property-only clairvoyance, and disabled or negated altmeta. The signed metallivore-mask concern was rejected because Boolean of the signed nonzero result matches C. Concurrency found serialized execution and no issue. Direct post-fix inspection found no separate clarity or simplification trigger, so no optional pass or immediate audit-fix review ran; the audit-fix tail remains debt for the next scheduled review. Diff checks passed. No holdout access.

Session 019f8eb6-cd76-7702-8ef8-f3a70b9bd787; elapsed 1185s; usage 3373155 input, 3256064 cached input, 22326 output, and 4448 reasoning tokens. Correctness, readability-risk, test-quality, variable-trace, concurrency, and the consolidated adjudicator all completed; performance was omitted because no material resource trigger applied. Counts: 16 raw, 15 deduplicated, 13 confirmed and applied in linked audit-fix commit 7478ce8dbe0c46dd450d22b4fa9217c67ed204e0, 2 rejected, 0 deferred or unverified. Three production fixes reject unowned parked-guard and fog-cloud work before hero mutation, preflight only reachable hunger losses, and honor blocked Stealth. Three contract fixes clarify the ported scheduler, dual moveSingleMonster result channels, and monflee first semantics. Seven test fixes cover suspended async owners, apparent-position zero rolls, the amorphous gate, sanctuary gates, unconditional track clearing, and light or sanctuary fear causes. Artifact-light renaming was rejected because source-shaped naming and an exact quirk test provide counter-evidence; an extra distfleeck ordering comment was rejected because straight-line code and its exact-order test already protect the contract. Concurrency found no reachable issue in the serialized turn loop. Warnings: the isolated submodule directory was initially uninitialized, but final verification used the exact pinned local object store; only three child slots were available, so five independent finders ran in capacity-limited batches; native subagents exposed no separate session or usage summaries; one invalid polling interval was retried without losing a role or judgment. Validation after fixes: 1113 tests, all four generated-source checks, two strict fresh cases matching 5296 PRNG calls and eight complete screen or cursor states, development 204 screens with 77588 RNG calls and 243 cursors, and diff checks passed. Direct inspection found no separate simplification or clarity trigger, so no optional follow-up pass ran. World-effects and commands remain at their existing frontiers because earlier gaps precede this exact range. The audit-fix tail begins the next correctness range. No holdout access.

passes.head: 10dd52becdd3f3d2c6193b4b63483c3ad043bdaa

Session 019f8f1e-2ce5-7df3-8ca7-df4fc8b63daf; elapsed 1031s; usage 6545252 input, 6380544 cached input, 19824 output, and 5689 reasoning tokens. Correctness, readability-risk, test-quality, variable-trace, performance, and one consolidated adjudicator completed; performance was enabled because mfndpos is a per-monster hot path, while concurrency was disabled because these paths are synchronous, serialized, and non-reentrant. Counts: 16 raw and deduplicated, 15 confirmed and applied in linked audit-fix commit 4607698b36e976b398303b1308794d818dd01ab9, 1 rejected, 0 deferred or unverified. Three production fixes add the source Charisma floor to Conflict, make a missing trap-resistance owner transactional, and evaluate weapon visibility after assignment and old-light teardown. Four contract fixes document Conflict draws, mfndpos output metadata and hero-memory mutation, reusable scratch ownership, and artifact-light preflight. Seven test fixes cover Sokoban traps, displaced scary coordinates, shared displacement flags, zombie and Wizard Tower aggression, every online2 line family, corpse filtering, and combined tool selection. The yellow-dragon stoning claim was rejected because upstream worn resistance checks oc_oprop and yellow dragon armor supplies ACID_RES, not STONE_RES; the adjudicator initially conflated artifact and worn branches, then corrected all three judgments after direct source counter-evidence. Validation: 1158 tests and all four generated-source checks passed. Development remained 204 screens, 77588 PRNG calls, and 243 cursors. An ABBA Node 22.18.0 benchmark used seven 50000-call rounds per side across open-floor, trap, door, occupancy, and eel-retry cases; exact poss and info outputs matched, aggregate median time improved 33.4 percent and 32.9 percent in the two orderings, while GC event counts and time were effectively unchanged. The helpers remain behind the explicit unowned live monster-action boundary, so no fresh command differential can exercise these fixes yet. Direct post-fix inspection found no independent simplification, clarity, or repeat-review trigger; no optional follow-up audit or holdout access.
